headline: Agent orchestration and long-context tooling led the month while quantization broke out alongside a cluster of browser-sandbox techniques.
body: Agent-centric work dominated, with multi-provider Hermes workflows, Microsoft Scout acting proactively across Teams, email, and calendar, and ADK demonstrations all pushing orchestration and subagents forward. On the model side MiniMax M3 arrived as an open-weights option with up to 1-million-token context windows and Anthropic and OpenAI compatible endpoints, reinforcing the long-context and quantization momentum. Quantization registered a breakout, and a fresh set of new entrants centered on browser isolation appeared: sandboxed iframe, same-origin policy, srcdoc, and the sandbox attribute. Reliability surfaced as a theme through demonstrations of agents that silently fail web access by hitting CAPTCHAs or falling back to stale data.
